text.title: Instagram Reel Strategy and DM Funnel
text.summary: Reel optimization rules, weekly content schedule, DM trigger funnel, and engagement routine for Instagram growth.

rule.statement: Prioritize Reels over static feed posts for reach goals. Reels are redistributed via Explore to non-followers; feed posts are not.
rule.rationale: Explore distribution allows accounts to reach audiences 3-10x larger than their follower base. Static posts reach only existing followers.

rule.statement: The hook of a Reel must work with the sound off: text overlay and visual action are mandatory in the first 1-2 seconds.
rule.rationale: A large percentage of mobile users watch video without sound. A sound-dependent hook loses this audience in the first second.

rule.statement: Use 3-5 highly relevant hashtags per post. Never use 30 hashtags — this pattern triggers shadowban risk.
rule.rationale: Instagram's current algorithm gives no additional reach benefit beyond 5 hashtags. Large hashtag lists are a spam signal and can restrict distribution.

list.item: Tuesday: Behind the scenes — Story + Reel
Thursday: Value or tutorial — Reel + Carousel
Friday: Engagement or fun — Reel + Story
Saturday: User content or testimonial — Reel

rule.statement: Post Stories daily. Use polls and question boxes daily rather than passive image stories — these are the highest-engagement Story formats.
rule.rationale: Story polls and question boxes drive replies and DMs, which are the highest-value signals for relationship-building and conversion.

section.title: DM Trigger Funnel

rule.statement: Use DM trigger campaigns ("DM me 'GUIDE' to get...") instead of link-in-bio for lead magnets. DM triggers convert 3-5x better than link-in-bio clicks.
rule.rationale: A DM trigger starts a direct conversation with the lead. Link-in-bio sends traffic to a cold page with no relationship context.

example.note: Caption: "I built a 30-day content system that doubled my engagement. DM me 'SYSTEM' and I'll send it to you." This creates a warm DM conversation vs. a cold landing page visit.

antipattern.description: Using ManyChat or non-partner DM automation tools to send bulk automated replies.
antipattern.reason: Non-partner DM automation is against Instagram ToS and risks account suspension. Use only Meta-approved partner tools like ManyChat for keyword triggers.

section.reference: Agent prompt to generate 7 Reel scripts per week covering all content types
